name: Masked Stranger O.R.C. Waves
description: O.R.C. waves sent by the Masked Stranger to pressure the player outside a normal duel. The threat depends on which O.R.C. creatures participate in the area.
behavior: They behave as wave attacks: several modified creatures try to force mistakes, cut routes, and keep pressure constant.
interactionWithPlayer: The Masked Stranger uses these waves as indirect pressure. They should not be treated as one creature with global weaknesses.
interactionWithCreatures: O.R.C. variants of common insects and larger threats can participate when the zone or progression allows it.
strategy: Prioritize wave control, clean routes, and fast removal of small units before tougher creatures pin you down. Check each O.R.C. creature sheet for specific weaknesses and resistances.
environments: Areas with Masked Stranger-linked O.R.C. pressure

loot.item: Check participating O.R.C. creatures for their specific loot.

abilities.name: Sent Wave
abilities.description: The threat arrives as a group, not as one creature.

abilities.name: Variable Composition
abilities.description: It can mix smaller O.R.C. units, fast support, and heavier threats depending on the area.

specialTraits: No global weaknesses or resistances: they depend on each participating O.R.C. creature.
Treat it as an event entry and check each O.R.C. sheet for the real combat details.
